name: Robocorp
description: Robocorp — open-source Python-based RPA platform. Offers cloud orchestration, browser automation, and developer-first robot framework.

when_to_use: Python-based open-source RPA for developer-friendly automation
Browser and desktop automation with Robot Framework dialect
Cloud orchestration for unattended RPA bots at scale
CI/CD-friendly robot deployment replacing UiPath for devs
Open-source automation scripts with managed cloud runner

pros: Python-based RPA appeals to developer teams
cons: Python skill required to get real value
Less appealing to citizen developer audience
Acquired by Sema4.ai — future strategy shifting
review.verdict: Best RPA pick for developer teams, but Sema4.ai's AI pivot creates some platform uncertainty.
review.best_for: Python-savvy dev teams building code-first automation and bots
review.not_for: Citizen developers or business users wanting drag-and-drop RPA UIs
